response.overview: After the sudden passing of his beloved grandfather, a young man discovers a series of cryptic clues hidden within a dusty attic. Driven by nostalgia and the hope of a better life, he embarks on an arduous journey across the country to find a secret treasure. Along the way, he realizes the true inheritance might not be gold, but the stories his grandfather left behind.
response.title: The Treasure of My Grandpa
